items.title: Stones emerges as potential Chelsea target
items.summary: Free agent defender John Stones has emerged as a potential option for Chelsea in this transfer window.

items.title: Chelsea interested in former Man City defender Stones
items.summary: Chelsea are interested in signing England defender John Stones on a free transfer following his departure from Manchester City.

items.title: John Stones set for immediate Premier League return as giants consider free transfer for England World Cup star, 32
items.summary: CHELSEA are considering a deal to sign England defender John Stones. The veteran defender, 32, is a free agent after leaving Manchester City at the end of his contract this summer. items.title: Broad: England Test job less attractive than it was
items.summary: Former England bowler Stuart Broad says he understands Andy Flower's decision to turn down the England Test job, and is unsure over who the ECB turn to next, pondering whether the role has become "less attractive".

items.title: World Matchplay Darts LIVE! MVG vs Van Duijvenbode after Anderson wins
Old Firm disorder report damning - how will authorities respond?
items.summary: It took four months to land but, when it did, the independent review of crowd disorder at the Old Firm Scottish Cup quarter-final at Ibrox in March arrived with a mighty thud, writes Tom English.

items.title: Cristiano Ronaldo ‘likes’ post claiming Fifa helped Lionel Messi’s Argentina reach World Cup final
items.summary: CRISTIANO RONALDO has appeared to like an Instagram post claiming that Fifa helped Argentina to the World Cup final. items.title: 'They want us gone' - Man Utd fans' fury over ticket ultimatum
items.summary: Fans tell BBC Sport that a crackdown on touting is affecting some of the club's most loyal fans.

items.title: Forest make enquiry for Sporting's Diomande
items.summary: Sporting receives an enquiry from Nottingham Forest for centre-back Ousmane Diomande.

items.title: Chelsea files: Shock at record £117m Morgan Rogers deal, no rest for Alonso’s squad & Disasi transfer options
items.summary: CHELSEA'S British record deal to sign Morgan Rogers staggered a number of people. Not least Arsenal who had been pursuing a move for the England man all summer. items.title: Stokes scores century in first match for Durham after England retirement
items.summary: Former England captain Ben Stokes hit a match-winning hundred in his first appearance for Durham following his international retirement.
